payment year enrollment status. CMS uses the payment risk scores to determine MA reimbursement. As a result, 
the resolved risk score for a beneficiary that was FFS in the data collection period may be artificially low as the 
coding intensity adjustment may not be applicable. Investigators may “back-out” this coding intensity adjustment 
by identifying FFS beneficiaries (i.e., using the CCW MBSF)
